audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L234-236 (`if (assetParams.decimals == 0) { continue; }`) is the first executable statement per loop iteration in `checkUpkeep`, positioned before all three downstream branches: price evaluation (L238), ended-auction detection (L246-254), and eligibleAssets write (L264). A `continue` at L235 makes all of these unreachable for any asset with zero decimals, fully satisfying the invariant on every code path.
